events.title: Heartbeat modes budgets and stop conditions
events.summary: Added bounded codewiki_heartbeat tool contract and initial planner implementation for observe, maintain, and work modes with budgets, dry-run default, stop conditions, policy gates, and smoke coverage. Updated v2 operating model, product story, and task skill heartbeat policy.

Added bounded codewiki_heartbeat tool contract and initial planner implementation for observe, maintain, and work modes with budgets, dry-run default, stop conditions, policy gates, and smoke coverage. Updated v2 operating model, product story, and task skill heartbeat policy.

events.title: ThinkCode query executor integration
events.summary: Integrated optional ThinkCode context executor seam into heartbeat workflow: heartbeat now returns a bounded think_code_run script plan for view/task/graph context with native CodeWiki gateway/state fallback. Documented optional role and staged-write boundary in runtime/skills/README.

Integrated optional ThinkCode context executor seam into heartbeat workflow: heartbeat now returns a bounded think_code_run script plan for view/task/graph context with native CodeWiki gateway/state fallback. Documented optional role and staged-write boundary in runtime/skills/README.

events.title: Sanitation checkpoints and git history policy
events.summary: Updated roadmap closed-task retention to store compact semantic summaries instead of full raw context. Added checkpoint action to codewiki_task to snapshot release milestones with version labels, git shas, and canonical digests. Documented commit, push, and version boundaries in SKILL files. Verified behavior through new smoke tests.

Updated roadmap closed-task retention to store compact semantic summaries instead of full raw context. Added checkpoint action to codewiki_task to snapshot release milestones with version labels, git shas, and canonical digests. Documented commit, push, and version boundaries in SKILL files. Verified behavior through new smoke tests.

events.title: Audit read model wording in README skills and tools
events.summary: Audited and aligned read model wording across README, skills, and tools. Replaced "projection", "derived state", "generated state", and "read model" with "view", and "source of truth" with "canonical truth".

Audited and aligned read model wording across README, skills, and tools. Replaced "projection", "derived state", "generated state", and "read model" with "view", and "source of truth" with "canonical truth".
